messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: totally understand if something came up, let me know if there is a better time this week or next to chat. Hope all is well!!

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: hey

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey Kiran, I'm part of the founding team at Bedrock Data. Series A startup helping cloud-native SaaS and fintech companies with AI governance and data security. It's a space that's moving fast and we're right in the middle of it. Would love to connect.

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Been a while! Wanted to check back in and see how everything has been and see if we could grab some time. do you have 20 minutes over the next few weeks?

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey Jeremy, been a while since I reached out. A lot has changed here at Bedrock Data! Would be great to spark up a quick chat, no pressure at all

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Touché.. I should've been clearer, wasn't looking to compete with Wirespeed. We are more focused on the deep-dive data mapping (finding the PII/secrets) that happens before an incident even triggers an alert. Anyway, congrats on the progress with Coalition!

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Great to connect Venkat. How are things over at Coalition? Any dspm/data classification convos going on right now?

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey great to connect Kadir. wanted to see if we could find some time to chat, saw you were in cloud security and thought id reach out. would be great to hear whats top of mind for you!

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey thats great to hear!! Sarah and George are GREAT! Happy to hear you are a Bedrock fan as well, excited to see where convos go!

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Great to connect Kevin! Saw you were consulting over at Health Catalyst and thought it would be great to spark up a conversation. Would love to share what we are building here and see if it ever becomes a conversation topic for you.

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Great to connect Deepak! Seems like you have done a lot around infra security and automation at Coalition. Are you guys using an in house data classification tool? Or is that something you are outsourcing?

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey Achinoam, I'm on the founding team at Bedrock Data in SF. We're a Series A startup focused on data security and AI governance for cloud-native companies. Helping teams get ahead of what AI is exposing in their environment. Would love to connect.

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAADEOpmoBlSj_dSCbNltuBEgwEXdGEYrg5cw,NAME_SEARCH,1ikL)
messages.body: Hello Jacob, Thanks for reaching out! I am interested to know more about this opportunity!

messages.author: urn:li:fs_salesProfile:(ACwAACfTSD0BlJ4wgV8ZUjVGNOf690wVEfmKMG8,NAME_SEARCH,Q-nh)
messages.body: Hey Dor, I'm on the founding team at Bedrock Data. Series A startup working with cloud-native SaaS and fintech teams on data security and AI governance. Lots of interesting problems coming up as AI changes what's actually in these environments. Would love to connect.
